meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve No Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your SaaS vision. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to rapidly validate, build, and monetize your first AI-driven project.
content.answer_block: The 'no ideas' trap is simply a lack of market-facing feedback loops. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you can rapidly prototype micro-SaaS tools that solve actual user pain points. Stop brainstorming in a vacuum; start building, shipping, and iterating to discover the hidden revenue opportunities waiting in your niche.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You know you want to build, you have the hunger for a exit-ready SaaS, but the 'what' remains elusive. You are stuck in the paralysis of analysis, waiting for a lightning bolt of inspiration that never comes because you are looking at the market instead of listening to it.

True founders don't wait for ideas; they manufacture them through rapid technical execution. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your development environment into an automated laboratory. This isn't just about writing code—it's about stripping away the friction between your business hypothesis and a functional, revenue-generating MVP.

steps.title: Initialize the Lean Environment
steps.description: Configure your workspace to favor rapid iteration. We need a structure that allows for instant deployment and testing, ensuring you aren't bogged down by boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current market trends in [Niche] and suggest 3 micro-SaaS features that solve high-pain problems with low technical overhead.

steps.title: Automated Market Validation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to draft a landing page copy that highlights a specific user pain point, acting as a smoke test for your idea before writing core logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a high-conversion landing page copy focused on the pain points of [Target Audience]. Include a call to action for a waitlist.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create landing page component with tailwind'

steps.title: Rapid Logic Prototyping
steps.description: Build the core functional engine of your app. Focus on the single feature that solves the 'primary pain' identified in Step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular TypeScript function that handles [Core Feature] and integrates with the Stripe API for subscription management.

steps.title: Integration of Antigravity Flows
steps.description: Connect your logic to real-world data sources using Antigravity's abstraction layer to ensure your MVP is data-driven from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an Antigravity hook to pipe real-time user feedback from the landing page into a structured database schema.

steps.title: Iterative Feedback Loop
steps.description: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment and use Claude Code to perform an automated code review based on 'SaaS scalability' best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for potential bottlenecks and suggest improvements for 10x scalability.

pro_tips: Never build the full app; build the 'concierge' version where the AI does the heavy lifting while you verify if users actually pay.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep track of your business logic so you don't have to re-explain your monetization model every session.
Focus on 'Time-to-First-Dollar' as your primary KPI; if a feature doesn't directly contribute to revenue, kill it immediately.
Leverage Antigravity's branching to test two different landing page value propositions simultaneously before finalizing your main branch.
Always wrap your API calls in retry logic to prevent churn caused by minor network fluctuations during the MVP phase.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, push it to a platform like Vercel, share it in three niche communities, and use the incoming feedback to guide your next set of Claude Code commands.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the blueprint, and the technical edge. The only variable remaining is your commitment to shipping. Stop waiting for the perfect moment and start building the perfect prototype. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
